titleStmt.title: SII 34.432: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 432. Sankaranayinarkōyil, Sankaranayinarkoyil Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On the main gōpura of the Śankaralingasvāmi temple.

summary.p: Viśvāvasu, Vaigāsi 24, Monday, Uttarāshāḍha = c. 17th-18th Century.

This records the rights and privileges enjoyed by the communities of kuḍumbar (also called Dēvēndira or Deyvēndira kuḍumbar) and the paṟaiya as given by some unnamed Pāṇḍya king. It narrates that once upon a time when the world was facing severe drought the Pāṇḍya, Chōḻa and Chēra kings went to the court of Dēvēndra (Indra) seeking rain. As the god was whiling away his time giving false promises the Pāṇḍya king got angry and left the court but only after taking forcefully some children of the celestial ladies for making them the heads of four families of the kuḍumbar. He also brought with them all the required seeds and pair of livestock for cultivation. For the eldest member among the celestial children he bestowed the title Deyvēndra-kuḍumbaṉ and for three others the titles of vāriyaṉ, akkasālai, and iḷakatāri respectively. Upon the efforts of these people the cultivation of crops thrived making the king happy. Hence the king bestowed on them various honours like white elephant, silver parasol, day-time torch etc. Now on the basis of the document which had sanctioned the above privileges to the kuḍumbaṉs, the paṟaiya community also got some privileges but of lesser ranking than those of the kuḍumbaṉ community (lines 9—14).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vicuvācu varuṣam vaikāci mātam 10 4 tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum Uttirāṭamum peṟṟa nāḷ teyvēntira kuṭumpaṉ vālāttumpaṭi muṉ Eṭutta tūvāparayukattil Ukkira peruvaḷutiyum cēraṉum
cōḻaṉum lōkam vaṟumai paṭṭu Irukkiṟa kālattilē tēvēntiraṉ pakkal maḻai kēḷkka pōṉa Iṭattilē makavāṉum maṉam kuḻirntu Irummeṉa cēraṉum cōḻaṉum vaṇaṅki
Irukka pāṇṭiyaṉ teyvēntiraṉuṭaṉē kūṭi Irukka teyvēntiraṉum varucai ceyyiṟāppōlē kavaṭu niṉaikka pāṇṭiyaṉum kōpittu yeḷuntu tevvakaṉṉi makkaḷ
nālu kuṭumpattārai kaippiṭiyāk kūṭṭi koṇṭu ceṉṉal viraiyum kaṉṉal viraiyum katali viraiyum paṉai viraiyum Itu mutalāṉa palavittum Oru Iṣavum curaviyum koṇṭu pūmiyilē vantāṉ
nālvar mutavaṉai teyvēntira kuṭumpaṉ paṭṭamṅkaṭṭi mūṉṟu pērukku vāriyaṉ Akkālai Iḷakatāripaṭṭam kaṭṭi Oru nāḷaikku kaṉṟu veṭṭi veḷḷāmai kaṇṭa paṭi yiṉālē rācāvum manammakintu
veḷḷai yāṉaiyum veḷḷi vaṭṭa kuṭaiyum keṟāṭiyum pakal pantam pāvāṭai raṭṭai cilampum raṭṭaic coṭukkum naṉmaikku patiṉāṟu pantakkālum tīmmaikku raṇṭu tērum pañcavaṉṉa virutum patineṭṭu me
Eṉṟu naṭappiccākaḷ Āṉapaṭiyiṉālē
kuṭṭi kuṭumpaṉum Allāttar kuṭumpaṉum kūṭikkoṇṭu cumukamāka [kuṭi-]
yēṟa Ātipūṟuvam rācākkaḷ kuṭutta paṭṭayam pāttu paṟaiyārukku Uṇṭā
ṉa varucai nammaikku mūṉṟu kāl pantakālum Oru cilampum Orukkoṭukkum
Oṟṟai mārāppum Oru pantamum kīḻpāvāṭaiyum mañci kaṇṭiyakkompu
yillāta vīṭum tīmmaikkuk kaṭṭaṇamum paṭṭaya piṟakaram kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭōm
kuṭumpakaḷukku kutirai kuṭaiyum Iṭṭu kuṭai virutā koṇṭa viraipāṭu kuṭuttu Inta varucai
piṟakāram kaṭṭaḷai Iṭuvittōm keṅkaik karaiyilē kārāmpacuvai koṉṟa
Digital edition of SII 34.432 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
